description: Harbor system robot wildcard permission gap: filterRobotPolicies missing from system robot RBAC evaluator chain, causing 403 on project robot creation

rbac_gap.system_robot_evaluator: System robots construct RBAC evaluator without filterRobotPolicies parameter
rbac_gap.project_robot_evaluator: Project robots include filterRobotPolicies in their evaluator construction
rbac_gap.missing_parameter: filterRobotPolicies not passed to NewBuilderForPolicies for system robots
rbac_gap.consequence: System robot wildcard permissions for robot operations not correctly filtered through project RBAC evaluator

permission_check_flow.failure: RBAC evaluator for system robot does not include robot-specific policy filtering, causing permission denial

remediation: Add filterRobotPolicies parameter to system robot RBAC evaluator construction in context.go
Update requireAccess() to handle system robot wildcard permissions
